core_rule: Nothing leaves the project without a Deprecation entry and a Snapshot reference.

lifecycle_states.description: Flagged for retirement but still present in the tree.

promotion_rules.to_deprecated: Once verification is complete and retirement is authorized.
promotion_rules.to_removed: If the candidate was wrong — append Communications note about false-positive flag.

lifecycle_states.anti_pattern: Entries that sit in candidate > 30 days without status review.

lifecycle_states.description: Retired but still in the tree as stub/redirect/soft-disabled/superseded entry.

promotion_rules.to_archived: Once incoming references updated AND ≥14 days cooling-off AND no agent re-activation.
promotion_rules.to_reversed: If deprecation reversed — append Decision and mark Status reversed.

lifecycle_states.description: Removed from working tree but content in cold storage (snapshot).

promotion_rules.to_purged: Only after retention period (default 12 months) AND no recovery requests.
promotion_rules.to_recovered: If content pulled back out — append Communications, mark Status recovered.

lifecycle_states.promotion_rules: No promotion from purged. Metadata pointer stays forever; only content is gone.
use_only_for: content never recoverable (lost to silent deletion before this ledger existed)
content deliberately purged for safety/compliance (rare; must pair with Decision)

required_fields_schema.title: string

identity.kind: file | folder | ledger_entry | route | sub_agent | box | schema | env_var | api_endpoint | widget | dependency | setting | other

required_fields_schema.status: candidate | deprecated | archived | purged | reversed | recovered

incoming_link_audit.tooling: Grep / rg sweep covering all referenced surfaces
incoming_link_audit.blocker_rule: Entry with non-empty incoming_links_remaining cannot promote past deprecated without steward/human signoff.

snapshot_protocol.purpose: Recovery surface for everything in this ledger. Without a snapshot, archived means lost.
captured_paths: CCAgentindex/agents/ (excludes per-run receipts in daily; included weekly)

cadence.name: manual
cadence.retention: indefinite (until referenced by a purged entry's retention rolls over)

snapshot_protocol.phase_c_status: wired to orchestrator cron / launchd via Snapshot Steward
snapshot_protocol.snapshot_id_convention: basename of zip without extension (e.g., snapshot_2026-04-30_0300_daily)
health_checks: Did previous scheduled snapshot run on time?
Does each Deprecation entry's snapshot_id resolve to an existing zip?
snapshot_protocol.missing_snapshot_protocol: If a referenced snapshot is missing (pruned past retention while still referenced), promote that entry to recovery_difficulty: not_recoverable and append Communications warning.

recovery_procedure: Read Deprecation entry. Note snapshot_id and snapshot_path.
Inspect content. Decide full / partial / read-only restore.
If restoring to live tree: update entry to status: recovered with recovered_at + recovered_by + recovery_notes.
If recovery reverses a Decision, append Decisions Ledger record.

relationship_to_other_ledgers.decisions: Retirements often authorized by a Decision. Cross-reference both directions.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.open_problems: Problem closed by removal generates Deprecation entry. PROB stays closed; DEPR captures removal.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.communications: Reversed deprecations / false-positive flags / recovery notes generate Communications entries.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.temporal_continuity: TCL §3 summarizes retirement; DEPR holds full record.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.definition_of_done: DoD §11 (Ledger Update Matrix) gains row for deprecation occurred → DEPRECATION + activity.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.source_of_truth: If deprecated item was a SoT declaration, SoT must be updated.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.file_contents: When a file deprecates, FCL drops its row.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.asset_widget_map: When a widget deprecates, AWM drops its row.
relationship_to_other_ledgers.page_ledgers: When a page retires, the Page Ledger itself is deprecated (rare).
relationship_to_other_ledgers.box_bus: When a Box deprecates, its subscribes[] / emits[] cascade upstream.

active_entries.title: Bedrock retired domains (Apr 2026 great trim)
active_entries.incoming_links_audited_partial: CLAUDE.md and GLOBAL_LEDGER.md updated; comprehensive sweep deferred to steward
active_entries.do_not_undo_casually: These domains were inherited scaffolding from the personal-scope predecessor, not Comeketo-load-bearing. Do not rebuild without a Decision.
active_entries.notes: Backfill entry. Pre-dates the Deprecation Ledger; captured here as Phase A close-out.

active_entries.title: Audit Ledger (planned, never built)
active_entries.do_not_undo_casually: Audit-shaped work routes to Open Problems / Decisions / Communications / per-Box. Don't rebuild as a separate ledger without a Decision reversing DEC-2026-04-29-004.
active_entries.notes: Never-built deprecation. Captures a build-plan retirement. Draft outline at Ledger Drafts/# Audit Ledger.txt survives.

active_entries.title: Sub-agent draft packages relocation (root → /Subagent Boxes/)
active_entries.incoming_links_audited_partial: Known refs in INDEX.md, TCL §1.5, GLOBAL §3 updated; comprehensive sweep deferred
active_entries.do_not_undo_casually: Don't move them back to repo root. /Subagent Boxes/ pairs with the future LEDGERS/BOXES/<name>/ unified pattern (DEC-2026-04-29-015).
active_entries.notes: Operational relocation — content preserved, just moved.

active_entries.title: Apr 2026 trim retired UI routes

identity.path: (former routes) memory, prediction, commitments, commitment_detail, inbox, inbox_detail, calendar, Rodbot, projects, tables, table_new, table_detail, chat

active_entries.superseded_by: (varies — some folded into briefing/activity/automation; some intentionally dropped)
active_entries.incoming_links_audited_partial: page_asset_sitemap.md and CLAUDE.md updated; cross-ledger sweep deferred
active_entries.do_not_undo_casually: Retired because they were scaffolding from personal-scope predecessor or duplicated existing surfaces. Don't rebuild without a Decision. Note: delegations was later authored as a Page Ledger because it survived as a real surface — verify route status before adding any retired route in the future.
active_entries.notes: Backfill. Documents Apr 2026 trim. Boundary case (delegations) flagged in notes.

phase_status.phase_a: ledger authored, snapshot script available manually, four backfill entries seeded
phase_b_followup: Author LEDGERS/BOXES/deprecation/ unified Box per DEC-2026-04-29-015
Author steward runnable form (AGENTS.md, config.json, prompt.md, receipts/)
Wire steward: 30-day candidate sweep + snapshot health checks + accept candidates from any Box
phase_c_runtime: Wire snapshot script to daily cron / launchd
Hook steward into Box Bus runtime — emit deprecation candidates upstream
Build recovery automation wrapping §7.6 in single command

anti_patterns: Silent deletion (no entry; future agents follow stale references)
Tombstone proliferation (# DEPRECATED files sit forever)
Snapshot drift (snapshots run, no one verifies)
